title: senecio oxyriifolius subsp. milanjianus
intro: Senecio oxyriifolius subsp. milanjianus, also known as Milanjian wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an antiseptic agent. The milanjian wormwood is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing pain and improving immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
